title: Gray Goo
description: A mod which adds destructive nanotechnology into Minecraft!
body:
# Gray Goo Mod Have you ever wanted to bring nanotechnology into Minecraft? What if that nanotechnology self-replicated out of control? The gray goo mod has answers to all of these questions! **Fabric only!** ## Gray Goo The titular block of the mod. Customize it with the nanite modifier!
Gray Goo Image
## Nanite Modifier The block which can modify your gray goo. Use nanite traits to modify your goo!
Nanite Modifier Image
Nanite Modifier GUI Image
## Destruction Once you add all the traits you want. Place the block down and watch as your world crumbles before you.
Gray Goo Destruction Image
## Wiki The wiki has all the available information about the mod, including crafting recipes. Visit it [here](https://github.com/Jaggwagg/gray-goo/wiki/Home).
